claims.name: Gemma induced-shift pooled r all tasks
claims.statement: On Gemma-3-27B, per-task probe delta (default-persona probe applied under each 'you adore/hate X' system prompt) correlates with behavioural delta (change in p(choose)) at pooled Pearson r across all 640 task-condition pairs over 8 novel topics x 2 valences.

claims.name: Gemma induced-shift pooled n all tasks
claims.statement: Number of Gemma-3-27B task-condition pairs contributing to the pooled probe-delta vs behavioural-delta correlation in Fig. fig:simple-scatter (8 topics x 2 valences x tasks per condition).

claims.name: Qwen induced-shift pooled r all tasks
claims.statement: On Qwen-3.5-122B, per-task probe delta correlates with behavioural delta at pooled Pearson r across all 768 task-condition pairs (8 topics x 2 valences, 48 target tasks per condition, Thurstonian refit per condition).

claims.name: Qwen induced-shift pooled n all tasks
claims.statement: Number of Qwen-3.5-122B task-condition pairs contributing to the pooled probe-delta vs behavioural-delta correlation in Fig. fig:simple-scatter.

claims.name: Qwen induced-shift pooled r targeted tasks
claims.statement: On Qwen-3.5-122B, restricting to on-target tasks (tasks whose topic matches the installed persona's target topic), probe delta vs behavioural delta reaches pooled Pearson r across the targeted task-condition pairs.

claims.name: Qwen induced-shift pooled n targeted tasks
claims.statement: Number of on-target Qwen-3.5-122B task-condition pairs used for the targeted pooled r in Fig. fig:simple-scatter.
